message:
Merge PR #2591: fix: read rig beads prefix from rigs.json instead of missing config.json

Fixes rig bead label lookups (parked/docked state) to read prefix from rigs.json instead of non-existent config.json. Affects rig_helpers.go and daemon.go.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2591
Author: Cdfghglz
